results.title: Federal NDP leader Avi Lewis pushes back on claims the party is on ‘life support’ during PA stop
results.description: New Federal New Democratic Party (NDP) leader Avi Lewis concluded his tour of Saskatchewan with a stop in Prince Albert on Sunday.

results.title: Woman SCREAMS at Mayor During Mosque Shooting Press Conference: ‘F***ing Direct Result of Your Leadership!’
results.description: A woman absolutely lost it on San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria during a press conference after a deadly shooting at a mosque in the city. The post Woman SCREAMS at Mayor During Mosque Shooting Press Conference: ‘F***ing Direct Result of Your Leadership!’ first appeared on Mediaite .
